review_text: Has a great family vibe. Loads for kids to do. Amenities are great and lots of them close by.

Powered campsite- nice and level, good grass throughout park. Lots for the kids to do including big splash park, mini putt putt, park equipment, buggy hire and other activities during school holidays.
Their gates will lock you in or out of the park and they don't answer the emergency contact number
Perfect spot on the water. Facilities and amenities were fantastic and clean.

"Stayed in one of the cabins and really enjoyed it. Plenty of open space for playing sports, which is great for kids. The pool was good, and there's BBQ equipment available. Being right by the lake, the views are beautiful. Lots of room for big families too.

Great place enjoyed my stay sorry you guys have had to put up with those naughty kids instead of everyone else though missing out on accessing the rec room why don’t you hunt down the parents of these kids and tell them if the behaviour continues you will have to ask them to leave I’m sure it will stop if not just tell them to leave you shouldn’t have to put up with that and people shouldn’t have to miss out on accessing the rec room because of these naughty kids.
Bang on 👍🤣
Large well set out park close to lake.
Ensuite waterfront sites. Excellent location.
Very well organised park with large caravan sites.

Stayed for a last minute weekend away on powered site. Site was great size and plenty of room for our slide out and car without feeling we were encroaching on either neighbour. Arrived after hours and had no issue with that at all. Staff were lovely and accommodating when making booking. Shower blocks clean. Will be back!
This is our sixth visit to this beautiful park. Even though it was full for a lot of our stay, everyone was well behaved and the kids are so tired at the end of a busy day, the nights are very quiet.

Awesome caravan park, great amenities including waterpark, putt putt, playgound, sensory room and of course the lake. Clean, tidy, great staff. Will definately rebook.
5+ stars.
Great spot! Close to everything, helpful staff and little ducks came to visit us. very cute!

We stayed in one of the villas and loved it.
Will definitely stay again and recommend it.
Was not a big fan of the pool sorry, but if there were a Splash Park for the kids it would have been awesome

With its fantastic location, modern upgrades, and exceptional customer service, it’s no surprise that our customers from Caravan Spares and Repairs consistently leave wonderful feedback about Swansea Caravan Park.  This is also a local  favourite for families, couples, and travellers who appreciate a clean, peaceful, and well‑run park.

If you enjoy being kept awake until 2:00am several nights a week with a DJ echoing through the park, despite “quiet time” supposedly starting at 10:00pm,  then Lakeside Caravan Park may be the perfect destination for you. We stayed here for over a week across three sites and were shocked at how little interest management showed in enforcing their own rules or quiet time, additional people and cars on sites even after we contacted them.

When we raised our concerns with Andrew, the host, they were dismissed entirely. We were told the offending guests would be “banned” in future, although they hadn’t actually been informed of this, and when we suggested clearly communicating New Year’s Eve curfews to guests, we were advised to rethink our future plans instead. A professional and guest-focused approach this was not. The bathrooms also left a lot to be desired, with cleanliness clearly not a priority.

So, if you’re after loud late-night parties, zero management accountability, and less-than-fresh amenities — this is the park for you 😊

If not, I’d strongly recommend staying elsewhere
Camped here for 3 days would recommend

Very nice holiday park great views staff really friendly very secure facility clean  pools were great my kids feed the ducks and stuff plenty of stuff to do if you have kids like me take their bikes and some light fishing gear fish in the lake all gates including access to the lake requires your park pin to get in and out pretty safe adults just kick back enjoy

Had a short trip away from Sydney with my family. This caravan park is nothing short of amazing, and I feel like pretty much everything to accommodate a person in a wheelchair like me has been though of, from on site hoists, height adjustable kitchen benches, even a ramp into the swimming pool, and a water safe wheelchair to take guests in. The really enjoyed the onsite sensory room- a calming, dimly lit room with soothing music and soft lighting, as well as fluffy cushions to sit on and patterns and textures to relax and rejuvenate the eyes and brain. Can’t wait to come back!

Did not like being fenced in .. codes to open gate to get to the foreshore with all the stuff you take . Was horrible.  Suggest having gates open through the day and lock up at night to stop thieves. Sorry I won't be back.
The only thing that I could complain about was the wind Great park Clean amenities Will visit again

We recently spent three nights at Swansea Lakeside Holiday Park in our caravan, accompanied by my husband and our two young children (aged 2 and 3). The stay was thoroughly enjoyable and exceeded our expectations. The local wildlife—particularly the ducks and possums—was a delightful highlight, leaving the children absolutely captivated.

The park’s facilities were excellent, with the splash park, swimming pool, and playground all conveniently located nearby. The beach was only a short walk from the opposite end of the park, providing a perfect balance of activities for families. We stayed on sites 508 and 509 alongside friends, which worked well, though we have already earmarked another site for our next visit as it offers generous shade and is situated very close to the beach.

Although I had read some negative reviews prior to our trip, our own experience was entirely positive. The staff were welcoming and helpful, even going so far as to repair a pedal bike on the spot so we could enjoy riding it immediately.

Overall, we found Swansea Lakeside Holiday Park to be a wonderful destination for families, and we look forward to returning in the future.
Great location but expensive powered site late November $89 night on weekend min 2 nights and the midges / sandflies are horrendous if you come bring loads of protection.

If you have kids this is the place for you and your family. Water Park, playground, Cafe open certain days, great coffee and food. Stick to the 8 kmh limit or less as kids on bikes, scooters shoot in front of you! Lake Macquarie views & swimming area. Not far from Swansea shops and pub.
Great location. Kids facilities are fantastic. Cabins were clean and comfy.
One of the best around lake Macquarie
Camp site was great. Well appointed and convenient location.

We recently stayed at Swansea Holiday Park and it did not disappoint.

The caravan sites are a generous size. The amenities were excellent and always clean, the pool area was great, and the beaches are fantastic.

Highly recommended.
It was the holiday of a lifetime!! I know a lot of people will tell you how beautiful the Mediterranean is, but all I can say is, they haven't been to Swansea Lakeside Holiday Park!!!
We visited the holiday park for Volkfeast car show. The area was well set-up with the use of park amenities.
Highly recommend, great park and location. All the staff were friendly. Great selection of cookies and coffee in the mini bar.

Unreal spot and everything you need for a great holiday with the family !
We will be back

Great park that ticks all the boxes. Seamless booking in process. Travelled with friends and had two powered sites booked. The park had a lovely, relaxed ambience near the water. And very peaceful & trouble free due to their NO PETS policy. Well done guys.. 👍

Excellent park.   Ticks all the boxes.   Well priced, large quiet site, spotless amenities, camp kitchen and amazing kids water play area and pool.  Convenient back gate for walks along the lake, or just sit on a bench and enjoy the serenity.

Highly recommend.

We booked three villas (one being accessible) for a family weekend. The location was fantastic with incredible sunsets. The facilities were perfect for a family. There is no extra charge for use of the Minigolf, waterplay or other amenities. Everything was clean and well presented. It would have been good to have some explanation of the automated door etc.
We had great time during long weekend. The facilities are great, staff are very friendly.
Great place to take the kids

had a great experience overall! I booked last minute and was lucky to get a powered site with a beautiful water view — such a bonus. The only downside was the poor Wi-Fi connection, which made it a bit hard to stay connected. Still, the location and convenience made up for it. Would definitely come back
Beautiful spot, clarity bay is amazing, the staff are legends, especially Blake! Very hospitable. I’ll be back!

We stayed in a tent with our relatives.
Very nice car park and well maintained caravan park with friendly staffs. Kids were so happy with Swansea Caravan Park, definitely we will comeback there as we didn’t stay that long this time.

Nice park and in an ideal spot, nice stuff finished, now for the bad. I'll say it first because the rest won't be read, or they will delete it, I'll be giving it a google review also where they can't delete it. Park management TOTALLY INCOMPETENT. We are travellers and live in our van, we booked a site on the 10/06/2024 to stay for 147 days over the Easter, Anzac day and school holiday periods in 2025, starting our stay on the 13/04/2025. We had a booking for site 151, when we booked it back in June 2024 we went to look at the site to make sure it was suitable as we have quite a bit of stuff along with 2 cars and a box trailer. The site looked ideal and we confirmed the booking. We have gone there again on the day prior our stay, that being the 12/04/2025 to confirm the site and how we would organise what we had to do. That's where the incompetent, apparently the female manager, confirmed she is nothing more than a postal person. We said to her on arriving that we wanted to check out what our plan of attack was going to be the following day. My wife had marked in her diary the original booking date and the site number, unlike miss incompetent, my wife is very good at her job. We had walked in off the street to do the inspection, we mentioned our booking and the site number we had booked. So miss incompetent let us go to the site, without asking us our name, she took it that we apparently know what we are talking about, we said a site number and she obliged, great management, a junior would get grilled for it. We arrived on the booking date 13/04/2025 and we were directed to a completely different site, unsuitable for my wife to work from home. Andrew the husband of miss incompetent, came the heavy in the office and accused me of being aggressive after they, the incompetents, totally screwed up our booking. I can agree there are some good points about the park, but make sure you confirm your booking in full detail.

********************

We can understand your need to defend yourselves, it's only a normal human response.
We visited the office shortly after our booking in 2024 to confirm and inspect the site, if 151 was not available as you have stated, why wasn't this advised at that time?
We have never stayed at the park before and wouldn't know if it had 100 or 300 sites, did we just pluck 151 out of thin air? If we were told 501, we would have been identified on our initial visit and advised our site was 501. We would have discussed with office staff that that site wasn't suitable and other options could have been offered if available.
The entire situation was created through bad administration of the park and hopefully lessons have been learnt by both management and potential customers.
Nicht viel los in Swansea, aber der Platz war ordentlich.
Always enjoy our time at Swansea Lakeside holiday Park it's our home away from home.

Awesome place to take the kids the water park/pools are very well maintained as is the site BBQs/bathrooms/bins etc
will be back again for another stay in the future

We are still so disappointed with our relocation to 617 from 612. We chose 612 as part of a group booking with our group in Vans just behind us. I do understand that booking choices are not guaranteed but surely for a 2 week stay you could have done better. Sending me confirmation of our booking in the week preceding our stay that we were in 612 and not advising of the move before arrival was very upsetting. We as a group personally came and picked the sites so that the vans and cabin were close. Our group experience was disjointed. Normally a move to another identical cabin would not have been mattered but the way it was handled was poor. I was told just to email the managers with my concerns and then it took until the Thursday for a reply.

Unfortunately whilst the park is great, the customer service is extremely poor! I’ve called at least 18 times in 2 days and have left messages, sent emails and cannot get through to anyone! The website does not allow you to book online and requests you to call…… how does anyone book to go to this park! Poor customer service will loose customers! Surely the park is making enough money to have someone answer the phone calls?

There is no one to answer phone calls we have a booking there and can’t get in touch with anyone at the office I have called 25 times in the last 3 days left messages and no return calls this is very poor on there behalf I have never had this problem with any other park poor poor poor
Great location clean and tidy.
Great spot clean and friendly staff. Great stay we will be back!

We took our 7yo grandson, visiting from country NSW, to SHP mainly for the water park and pool experience. The water park was good, but as he was not a strong swimmer, we were very concerned that the pool design was strange...usually there is a shallow end and deep end, but this is not the case here. The difficult part was that there were no depth indicators, no diagrams posted to show design and depths, and even the staff couldn't tell us the "safe" areas for a young child. We had an older grandchild with us and she walked and swam the pool to give us some idea. In the end we simply ignored the pool, which limited our grandsons' enjoyment of which was a very expensive Dec 20 & 21 stay. Also, the milk supplied on our arrival was already a month and a half out of date (Nov 6). We hadn't used it, so took it with us and froze it...only just noticed the date Feb 23. All in all, it was a very expensive 2 day stay...have had better.
I love this place, great for the kid with in park water park and pool and great scenery all around in great little town I'd love live in
So family friendly good price
Excellent location to take your family, lots of activities for children. nice clean cabins and wonderful friendly service.
Amazing place for the whole family, the lakeside, the pool and water slide! Amazing. Been here for a few years and we keep coming back.

Great location, great beach type area on lake   nice and shallow kids loved it.
Pool water was so hot felt like a bath getting into it.
Tiles coming off and the shot Crete coming apart on the walls.
Pool was a let down wasn't clean.
Slide water was cold and heaps of fun. On one of the slides they have done a fix and it gives kids bruises when they hit the lip that their fix has created.
Button for hot water in the showers was a bit strange haven't seen one of them in years.
Kids room had literally nothing in it just a room.
No daily activities for kids which you get at a number of other parkes
The burger van isn't open till after Xmas which was a let down.
Need more rubbish bins for sites around the park.
Kids ninja park was awesome
Kids play ground awesome
Basketball court really well done
Looks like they spending money on the place they just forgot the pool

Great spot for camping. Love the splash park and swimming pool. Great entertainment for the whole family. Through a gate you can enter the lake. Good for fishing. Showers are included. Just push the button to get hot water.
Washing machines on the side. You can pay by tap and go.

Bring your scooters and little bikes for the children.

Great location, amenities well kept but the pool was let down. No rubbish collected over the weekend led to wildlife spreading rubbish through out the park. Technicians came daily and poured chemicals in the pool but no cleaning. Bandaids, hair, leaves, grimy tiles, wooden skimmer lids with sharp edges sticking up. Very unhappy with this.
Depth markers faded and ineligible, very unsafe.
Slides great fun until kids load it up with dishwashing liquid and the filth in the end was disgusting. Really let down the whole experience

Excellent friendly clean well set out park. We bbqd down there for international Day For the disabled and brin g disabled myself I made sure I had a good look around. Clean wide streeets5,, great water theme park excellent n t access to well built an d maintained disabled facilites. The park al d o has 2 fully supported disabled accommodation units in the park.

Beautiful park that felt like jail. A code for gate to walk in and out to the lake, code for pool, code for toilet, code to get past reception. 3 gates to pool all locked except 1. Holy they even had timers on shower that shut off after 6mins and you wouldn’t get hot water again for 3mins later. Staff were great . Park was clean but the codes drove us all insane
Kids loved it, super packed
Great club looks lpvely
Very clean facilities. Great for kids.
Beautiful  holiday park very clean great location

Amazing Park with amazing amenities. The park manager Andrew and his team are extremely friendly and have the park running immaculately. Andrew always has a smile on his face and takes time to chat. I highly recommended Swansea Lakeside Caravan Park to anyone considering going there for a holiday.

An awesome caravan park; neat and tidy, well maintained grounds, even a water park for the kids! Great location for a stay-cation or a holiday that's still close to town. The staff couldn't have been more helpful with our stay, Thank you!
Always liked our trips to Swansea and this site on suites could be cheaper, plenty to walk to.

Stayed in our caravan, toilets and showers clean and modern, sites large and well kept, Outlook over Lake macquarie lovely, great watermark and playground for kids, bbq's and tables, concrete slabs, ensuite sites, most importantly very helpful and friendly staff. We WILL revisit.

We stayed for two nights on the powered sites 311-310. Sites were very large which was great and somewhat different to other parks which was a nice change. BBQ however was broken near our site and despite been told that it would be looked at, it wasn't during our stay. Pool facilities and water park looks fabulous for young kids. We don't have nay and it was winter so we didn't use them.|Games/library room was closed so could not go in there during our stay which was a shame. |Not sure how often staff clean out the camp kitchen fridge. There was milk and a chicken that had both gone out of date on 16th April 20024 and we were there 22 June!|Two things that are rather annoying is the three different combinations you need for gate, toilets and boomgate. Not such a pain if you have a photo I guess. The times showers were also a little '1984' like. Again, I can sympathise with busy months and having many people there, just a little strange and a bit like staying at a relatives place who doesn't like you using too much hot water!
Great place.  Will be better in summer when not pouring rain
Ten out of 10 showers and toilets, grounds, cabin and service all brilliant. Highly recommend.

Due to the sudden passing of one of our family members we had to quickly make arrangements for us to stay close to where the funeral was arranged.What can I say but thank you all involved so much for your kindness and going above and beyond to accommodate our family needs.

My recent camping experience with you was less than satisfactory. I made two noise complaints and neither were actioned. This included me calling the after hours number which I rang at 10:30pm Sat night. I then attempted to call back and my calls were not answered. I then rang from my husbands phone and immediately received an answer. I then texted the following
"I rang over 20minutes ago to have the noise addressed. This is beyond ridiculous and I will be escalating this tomorrow with management. I expect the noise complaint addressed immediately. The neighbours tv (footy commentary post game) is still on and they are drinking and talking very loudly. The park has a 10pm lights out policy." The following day when I spoke to the man who said he was a manager he said 'Oh, it was you that complained', he then suggested the noise policy was 'loose' on weekends and that I should have addressed the noise issue myself. Being in a tent with two young children I don't think it appropriate to face a group of very intoxicated 50+ year olds at 11pm. He offered no solution or apology. The other complaint was in regards to the proximity of another families tent where the father had a SEVERE snoring problem (his own family including his 7 & 8 year old daughters had earplugs-we could hear them screaming for them the forst night beofre they went to bed), yet he chose to pitch his tent approximately 1.5m from ours. Again, I complained to the girls in office and was assured someone from management would ask them to move to the other end of their site yet nothing happened. I am beyond exhausted after my stay, it didn't feel like a relaxing nature immersion but a bogan fueled sleep deprived haze. I don't believe I will be back and I will be making sure my review is available for all future patrons to see. What a disappointment.

Rude and unfriendly staff. We arrived at 4:45 pm and their long day obviously played a part in the way we were rudely received. They spoke over the top of us, wouldn’t let us finish sentences and slammed down our registration form. Suffice to say we would never stay here.
Great camping it was full of people over easter break
Spent a day here visiting family who have camped. Excellent facilities, lots of family friendly activities available. Clean amenities. Very well looked after

Es hat mir dort sehr gut gefallen. Die Lage direkt am Salzwassersee ist sehr entspannt. Abends den ersten Sonnenuntergang an der Ostküste bewundert. Morgens am See Joggen gewesen. In Swansea kann man einkaufen, das ist nur 2 Autominuten entfernt. Ein Sternchen Abzug wegen der Enten und anderer großer Vögel, die die sites mit ihren Hinterlassenschaften verunzieren.
Ich würde wiederkommen!
Excellent. Big sites, good and clean amenities. Nice pool and water park.
Lovely spot
Extremely neat park with great facilities. Would be fantastic for kids and adults. Easy access to the lake.

Ideally situated with the kid friendly lake side Swansea beach, great pathways for walking and bikes, the skate park and kids playground soccer oval and boat ramps all nearby and in walking distance, Swansea RSL, Bowling Club, Swansea shopping center, all your family holiday needs are covered staying here.

Our large family stayed in this park over the weekend. Some members got cabins and others set up tents. This park is absolutely amazing. On most days we all just did our own thing and nobody was worried or bothered where anyone else was. There were so many activities to choose from like tennis, putt putt, water park, basketball court, exercise equipment, BBQs and eating areas, powered cites with wifi, clean toilets and showers and shops just around the corner for anything you needed. This is now one of our favourite family holidays and we will be back again. The park has an outstanding level of service and attention to detail.  Would highly recommend this to everyone!

Great caravan park, took our own van for a week. The kids and us had a fantastic time on the water slides and in the pool. Lake meters from our site and was a great alternative to the pool. There was also a ninja park, tennis court, putt putt, basketball court etc. We will be back!

Love this caravan park, but was very disappointed today when I went to the pool for a swim to see the cleaner going around in the pool, I worked at Swansea pool for 27yrs and NEVER would we leave a cleaner in the pool , 1. They run on electricity which does not mix well with water, 2. Small kids kept getting tangled in the lead, very dangerous,  I hope not to see this again, I'll be contacting council too . Thank you
Beautiful place, clean tidy amenities and fantastic staff who couldn't help us enough after our vehicle broke down in Swansea. Best park we stayed at in our travels 🙌

We live local but love this Beautiful park, beautiful staff, great facilities always clean. We loved that you have offered a extra service with the friendly girls from Dash offering coffee and snacks. Awesome we will be back.
Awesome destination. A family and fisherman friendly park. Something for everyone.
Really quite location , walk distance to the lake e a few cafes , rsl etc

Highly recommended accommodation.
Thank you to all the friendly staff and the Managers at Swansea Lakeside Park.
What a clean, tidy, and well-appointed Park you all provide.
Our van Ensuite site was wonderful. Very spacious and clean Ensuite, thank you.
The Park is situated perfectly with the Town centre and Clubs nearby, plus situated on the shores of Lake Macquarie where we adults and two young grandsons waded and fished in the clean water.
We also suggest visiting the lovely Swansea Workers Club for a fantastic and very well-priced meal.
We will return next year for another family holiday, and probably with more family members.
Another positive for us was the pet-free code at this Park. We are dog owners ourselves, however, the 'mess', barking, and wandering pets at other pet-friendly destinations have made a few holidays less relaxing. We understand pets are taken on holidays, that's great for the owners, but we prefer a destination without the pet poop and the dogs that bark a lot.
We are so impressed with Lake Macquarie Council's wonderful accommodation at Swansea. We are recommending this Park to everyone we speak to.
December 2023.

Loved being in the park with my motorhome on the new large concrete slabs. Shame about the people who do not read the park rules and adhere to them. Could be alot more pleasant. Especially in the toilet blocks and noise after 10.00. Should be huge signs everywhere DO NOT FEED THE WILDLIFE - DUCKS OR POSUMS OR LET THE CHILDREN CHASE AND TORMENT THE BIRD LIFE.

This isn’t a review so much on the park itself but wanted to post in hopes of people seeing this . I was camping there on the weekend with my little boy on packing up Sunday morning whilst putting down my avan the roof fell and sliced my head open I yelled out for help and people come running . I wish I had of asked  their names because I would love to thank them but in a state of shock I didn’t think to ask.  the camping community is one of a kind
Right next to the lake ✅ , very good layout , not far to Swansea RSL club
Nice caravan and tent camping 🏕️🥾 spot
Great place for the kids and clean facilitys
Great place Great staff and amenities
Love this place. Cabins can be expensive depending on your budget but a beautiful spot with great amenities.

Great holiday park. Amenities are of a high standard compared to other parks. Well kept and very clean, especially during long weekend n school holidays. Definitely be coming back. Only con is the 4 different codes to get around the park. Should be each site has their own code to get around
Best place to spend a great time with your friends and family! Secured place too.

Beautiful well kept park right on the lake. We have a nice powered camp site next to the new playground. Kids loved the splash park and spacious pool. Amenities were clean and park was tidy. Cons: bindis on our site and the 4 different codes to get into different parts of the park. I understand the security of the place having worked in a park myself, but woah! Also, there seems to be alot of signs saying what not to do instead of what to do. Getting in and out of the pool seemed to be a mission in itself. A sign to say enter pin and lift gate would be great. Yes, seems simple ONCE you know but I watched so many people struggle to get in and out of that gate. There was a code to enter the park, a code for the pool, a code for the toilets and a code for the gate to access the lake. For me, dragging two toddlers around with all our stuff and then having to stop and figure out which code is for what, was overkill. Other than that, we enjoyed our stay close to home. Would love to bring the family back as a day pass in Summer.
Stayed on unpowered sites was fantastic the park is great the surrounding areas  are beautiful the water was awsome weather was perfect.

Great place to stay!!! Friendly service, great views of the river and the sunset turned it on 🤩. Park is great for families and extremely clean. July was very quiet to visit and the fish n chips was fresh (ask reception for the best shop). Stayed midweek and would love to come back again 10/10 👍👍

Great location for friendly holiday stay, powered sites walk everywhere. Safe and easygoing holiday hamlet. Walk to Lake for all marine activities and water sports. Fresh seafood, restaurants and clubs nearby. Plenty of walking trails, privacy and free public fitness equipment.
#BBQs #kayakrental #Scubalessons #family
#cute #love #amazing #instalike #bestoftheday #trending #viral

What a great town, stayed in the caravan park which has direct access to the sea, great place for me to go for long paddles in the old kayak. Fantastic park will be going again.
다녀본 홀리데이파크중에 최고 👍 너무 행복한 시간
Well maintained
Lovely self contained units, nothing more required 🤌👍🏻
